Genetic alterations causing overexpression programmed death-1 ligands near universal classic Hodgkin lymphoma (cHL).
Nivolumab, programmed death-1 checkpoint inhibitor, demonstrated efficacy relapsed/refractory after autologous hematopoietic cell transplantation (auto-HCT) initial analyses three cohorts from CheckMate study nivolumab cHL.
Here, assess safety efficacy after extended follow-up three cohorts.
This multicenter, single-arm, phase study enrolled patients with relapsed/refractory after auto-HCT treatment failure into cohorts treatment history: brentuximab vedotin (BV)-naïve (cohort received after auto-HCT (cohort received before and/or after auto-HCT (cohort
Overall, patients were treated; cohort cohort cohort After median follow-up months, continued receive treatment.
objective response rate (95% 75%) overall each cohort.
Overall, median duration response 16.6 months (95% 13.2 20.3 months), median progression-free survival 14.7 months (95% 11.3 18.5 months).
Twenty-nine deaths occurred; none were considered treatment related.
With extended follow-up, responses nivolumab were frequent durable.
Nivolumab seems associated with favorable safety profile long-term benefits across broad spectrum patients with relapsed/refractory cHL.
Source Reference: Armand "Nivolumab relapsed/refractory classic Hodgkin lymphoma after failure autologous hematopoietic cell transplantation: Extended follow-up multicohort single-arm phase CheckMate Trial" Clin Oncol 2018; DOI:

last years, satellite data have satellites that monitor atmosphere satellites that actually measure temperature showed significant warming whatsoever."

record 'Pause': global warming years months!"

months later, Climate Depot announced that "pause" reached years, months.

they're only ones.

looking little history present should visit Ston.
This Medieval town whose history reaches back 14th century.
small town with second longest stone wall Europe (5.5km), after Hadrian's Wall (117km), with narrow quiet streets, noble ancient houses with traces ancient cultures.
impressive Ston Walls been described Croatia's answer Grand Wall China.
course, structure quite long Chinese counterpart 9,000 kms), with five kilometers length, still very impressive piece architecture.
began 14th century, when Dubrovnik that time known city-state Ragusa), extended influence over Pelješac Peninsula decided erect defensive line borders.
centuries, Ston Walls protected Dubrovnik's independence, providing stable commerce degree safety local populace.
Today, this large structure visited thousands foreign visitors, keen encounter this witness such long heroic history.
former significance 'salt city' confirmed even today oldest active salt-works world.
These salt works have remained faithful traditional natural methods salt production which changed since possibly back 4,000 years.
gulf Mali Ston, with villages Mali Ston, Hodilje, Luka Duba, clean natural environment.
been well-known mussel oyster farms since Roman times, oysters from Ston(ostrea edulis), considered natural aphrodisiac, have made this region world-famous.
from Ston beautiful Prapratno with centuries olives trees, Mediterrean macchia thickets clean sandy beaches site loveliest camps this region.
Ston channel, protected from wind, small villages Kobaš favourite hangout yachtsmen Broce.
Pelješac peninsula has, since ancient times, been famous vineyards, which have long tradition most important commercial activities region.
Ston really attractive town very big, with great history fascinating story that makes visit well worth-while.
